Our notaries are fully licensed and bonded, ensuring the highest level of trust and reliability.

BikeFix Express is a local bike repair shop located in Austin, TX. We specialize in quick and efficient service for all types of bicycles, from road bikes to mountain bikes. Our team can handle repairs ranging from tire changes to complete overhauls with parts sourced from top manufacturers.
